title: Caramelized Paleo Tiger Prawns
description: A festive Australian dish featuring raw tiger prawns caramelized to perfection in a peppery and velvety sauce for a paleo-friendly meal.
instructions: Clean and devein the tiger prawns. Rinse them under cold water.
In a small bowl, mix coconut sugar, apple cider vinegar, and a pinch of cayenne pepper until dissolved into a thin syrup.
Heat avocado oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the cleaned prawns to the skillet, cooking for about 30 seconds on each side or until golden brown.
Drizzle the caramelized mixture onto the prawns, tossing gently to coat them evenly.
Squeeze fresh lime juice over the prawns and mix well to distribute.
Peel and finely chop the red bell pepper. Add it to the skillet along with fresh ginger slices for a peppery touch.
Continue cooking until the sauce thickens slightly, about 1 minute more.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
